description: Canonical visual/text/semantic/hybrid comparison without silent visual fallback
initial_state: visual could silently fall back to hybrid in replay
final_state: visual/text/semantic compare only requested signatures; hybrid selects one common level

description: Diff protocol validation and safe application with sequential identity
final_state: validate_diff rejects invalid base, sequence, geometry, coordinates and final signatures before apply

initial_state: session metadata could depend on shared ReplayConfig
final_state: session_start derives independent per-session ReplayConfig and SessionReplayState contract exists

description: Distinct canonical/render snapshots and persisted OUT event fields
initial_state: snapshot contracts were generic dict helpers
final_state: CanonicalSnapshot and RenderSnapshot are distinct dataclasses with separate encoders/decoders; TerminalEngine uses TerminalDecoder through the public engine path

description: Single payload event collection and hostile frontend payload rejection
initial_state: frontend validation was permissive and payload refs helper was absent
final_state: reference payload helper and strict canonical JS validation added

description: Structured decoder warnings and raw fixture byte length contract
initial_state: decoder warnings lacked full structured TerminalDecoder contract
final_state: TerminalDecoder records session, sequence, direction, encoding and bytes in hex/base64

description: Finite acceptance runner and real Chromium renderer validation without skips
initial_state: acceptance runner was absent, two renderer state tests were skipped and extracted package gates depended on caller PYTHONPATH
final_state: runner records duration/exit/timeout, exports gateway PYTHONPATH, renderer state tests execute real assertions and Chromium pixel test is mandatory

description: Full final gate executes all phase gates, hash check, acceptance tests, test-all, packaging and tarball inspection
initial_state: final gate did not directly package and inspect the tarball
final_state: final gate builds the official tarball, lists it, verifies acceptance artifacts and rejects forbidden entries
evidence: phase 08 final gate passed with packaging and tarball-inspection steps

description: Synthetic manual replay validation with resize, reverse, background spaces, split UTF-8, split emoji, split RIS, seek and adversarial diff checks
initial_state: manual validation contract was not summarized with objective measurements
final_state: manual validation reports geometry, signatures, diff counts, payload bytes and rejection checks

description: Official package excludes local state, credentials, caches, raw logs and nested tarballs while including acceptance tests and summarized final reports
initial_state: rebuilt package lacked scripts/acceptance and packaging was not inspected inside the final gate
final_state: package contains acceptance scripts/tests/baseline, final report JSON/Markdown, manual validation JSON and log summary JSON; tarball inspection rejects forbidden entries
evidence: tarball-inspection passed; forbidden-entry scan found 0 matches

description: Final report and machine-readable results contain phase results, durations, hashes, manual validation, package metadata, process audit and extracted-package validation logs
test: python -m json.tool artifacts/final-acceptance-results.json; python -m json.tool artifacts/acceptance-matrix.json
initial_state: final report omitted some required evidence fields and used a separate external-only section
final_state: final report records all final-gate evidence and summarized logs; final report artifacts are packaged
evidence: JSON artifacts validate; exact final tarball path and hash are recorded in final-acceptance-report.md and final-acceptance-results.json
